note1_organization.summary: Delaware LLC formed 2007-09-12, began operations 2007-10-11. Wholly owned by Hilton Domestic Operating Company Inc. Franchisor of Hilton family brands in US, US territories, and Thailand for contracts executed/amended after 2007-10-24.
note1_organization.ip_licensing: Licenses IP (brand names, trademarks, service marks) from wholly owned affiliate of Hilton on a royalty-free basis, then sublicenses to third-party hotel owners.

revenue_recognition.primary_obligation: IP licenses granting right to access brand IP, reservations, and property management systems. Series of distinct services transferred over time.
revenue_recognition.variable_consideration: Franchise royalty fees — sales-based royalties recognized as hotel room sales occur. Variable fees allocated to distinct daily services.
revenue_recognition.fixed_consideration: Application, initiation, and other fees — allocated to performance obligations based on standalone selling prices. Recognized over contract term.
revenue_recognition.termination_fees: Recognized in period payment received — no further service obligation and uncertainty of collection.
revenue_recognition.unsatisfied_obligations: Not estimated for royalty fees (sales-based royalty exemption).

accounts_receivable.nature: Primarily amounts due from hotel owners with franchise contracts.
accounts_receivable.allowance_method: Based on historical collection activity, nature of instrument, and current/forecasted business conditions.

franchise_contracts.nature: Capitalized consideration paid to incentivize hotel owners (contract acquisition costs) + incremental costs to obtain contracts + acquired franchise contract intangibles.
franchise_contracts.amortization_method: Straight-line over contract term (generally 10-20 years, including sole-option extension periods).
franchise_contracts.amortization_start: Opening date of hotel or contract execution date, whichever is later.
franchise_contracts.amortization_of_acquisition_costs: Recognized as reduction of franchise royalty fees.
franchise_contracts.impairment_policy: Evaluate for indicators; if present, compare undiscounted future cash flows to carrying value. If not recoverable and exceeds fair value, recognize impairment loss. Allocate pro rata based on relative carrying values.

franchise_deposits.treatment: Recorded as current liability until non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenues. If application denied, recorded as other current liability until refunded less processing fees.

fair_value.hierarchy: Three-level (Level 1-3). Financial assets and liabilities estimated to equal carrying values as of Dec 31, 2024 and 2023.
fair_value.fair_value_option: Not elected for any financial assets or liabilities.

acquisitions_policy.business_vs_asset: Assessed based on inputs, processes, outputs, and concentration of fair value. Asset acquisitions: allocate cost including transaction costs to assets/liabilities based on relative fair values. No goodwill.

note3_acquisition.event: Acquisition of Graduate franchise contracts in May 2024 as part of Hilton's acquisition of Graduate brand.

note5_fair_value.summary: Fair values of financial assets and liabilities estimated to equal carrying values.

note6_income_taxes.us_income_tax: No provision — entity is treated as a disregarded entity for US income tax purposes. All taxable income/expense included in Hilton's computation.
note6_income_taxes.foreign_taxes: Certain US territories require taxation of franchise licensing payments to foreign-domiciled entities. Franchisee withholds and remits. Presented as foreign tax expense.

note7_commitments_contingencies.debt_guarantee: Certain Hilton debt obligations (maturing 2025-2033) are unconditionally and irrevocably guaranteed by material domestic subsidiaries, including this entity. ALL assets and franchise contracts pledged as collateral.
note7_commitments_contingencies.litigation: Various claims in ordinary course. Ultimate resolution not expected to have material adverse effect on financial position, operations, or cash flows.

note8_related_party.centralized_cash_management: Maintained by Hilton affiliates, not controlled by entity. Franchise deposits collected by affiliates into lockbox to which entity has no access.
note8_related_party.intercompany_receivable_nature: Certain receivables repaid through periodic settlements with simultaneous distributions of retained earnings to Parent.
note8_related_party.graduate_acquisition_note: Payment made by affiliate; short-term note payable recorded (current intercompany payables), settled February 2024 with accrued interest.
note8_related_party.operator_agreement: Agreement with Hilton affiliate entitling it to reasonable fee, but no compensation provided in 2024, 2023, or 2022.

note9_subsequent_events.note: Date in PDF reads 'March 18, 2024' but context clearly indicates this is an error for March 18, 2025 (matching audit opinion date).

key_depth_findings: ALL entity assets and franchise contracts are pledged as collateral for Hilton parent debt (maturing 2025-2033). This is a material encumbrance.
Entity is a disregarded entity for US tax purposes — no income tax provision.
Graduate brand franchise contracts acquired in May 2024 for ~$85M, 15-year useful life.
Contract acquisition costs (incentives to hotel owners) totaling $376M gross are amortized as reduction of royalty fees — effectively reducing reported revenue.
Operator agreement with Hilton affiliate: no compensation paid in any year, but entitlement exists.
Subsequent events note contains apparent date typo ('March 18, 2024' should be 2025).
